input.question: What was PTC's revenue growth in fiscal 2023?

output.cypher_preview: MATCH (a:Company)-[r:REPORTED]-(b:FinancialMetric) WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS 'ptc' RETURN a.name, b.name, b.value, b.year

input.question: What are Brown & Brown's business segments?

output.cypher_preview:
MATCH (n:Company)
WHERE toLower(coalesce(n.name, n.uri, '')) CONTAINS toLower($entity)
   OR toLower(coalesce(n.name, n.uri, '')) CONTAINS toLower($entity_norm)
OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[r]-(m)
RETURN coale

input.question: Who are the key executives at Alphabet?

output.cypher_preview: MATCH (c:Company)-[:EMPLOYS]->(p:Person) WHERE toLower(c.name) CONTAINS toLower('Alphabet') RETURN p.name, p.title
